programme.desc: Joey persuades Phoebe to teach him French for an important audition, while Monica and Chandler show a pregnant Erica the sights of New York and learn more about the baby's possible father. Guest starring Anna Faris and Ron Leibman(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joey's agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. Rachel worries about relocating to France, while Monica and Chandler are horrified to discover Janice is planning to buy the house next door to them. Guest starring Jane Lynch (Glee)(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang throws a going-away party for Rachel, but she prefers to say her goodbyes individually - and one of her friends is left feeling hurt at being overlooked. Meanwhile, Monica supervises the packing for a new life in the suburbs with Chandler, while also keeping a close eye on the mother of their future adopted child(n)

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice (2009)
programme.desc: A New England police chief is involved in a shoot-out that leaves his friend badly wounded. Coming under investigation by Internal Affairs, he finds himself increasingly at odds with the town council and defies its wishes by helping a woman search for her missing child. Detective thriller, starring Tom Selleck and Kathy Baker(n)

programme.title: Jesse Stone: No Remorse (2010)
programme.desc: The chief of police has been suspended from the force, and finds it harder than ever to control his drinking problem as a result. His old friend Captain Healy offers salvation by asking him to come to Boston and help solve a series of murders, but the investigation leads to a confrontation with the city's most dangerous crime boss. Detective thriller, starring Tom Selleck and Kathy Baker(n)

programme.title: The All-Inclusive: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: Three groups of different holiday-makers - the highly experienced Green family, the first-timer West family and a gang of young women from Crewe - descend on the same resort, to show how these places manage to be all things to all people. Along the way there are tips on getting the best sunbed, tackling drinking during the day and different ideas for lunchtimes. Plus, how do the kitchen staff pull off a last-minute menu change for 1,000 guests?(n)

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall treats a ridgeback-boxer cross that has become aggressive towards other dogs after being attacked, and helps a cancer patient with a badly behaved golden retriever that is holding back her recovery. His last port of call is to a miniature pincher who objects to any men coming near its owner(n)

programme.title: Draining the Tsunami City
programme.desc: Dr Jon Henderson investigates the ruins of Port Royal, hidden beneath the waters of Jamaica's Kingston Harbour after an earthquake and tsunami destroyed the city in 1692. Two thirds of the city sank in minutes, and 5,000 people died in the catastrophe and its aftermath. Since Port Royal's rediscovery in the 19th century, numerous excavations of the site uncovered ruined buildings and pirate treasure. Using the latest high-tech survey equipment, Jon reveals the full extent of the 33-acre sunken city for the first time, offering new visualisations of Port Royal and its devastating end(n)

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: Archaeologists conduct a dig at Auckland Castle in Co Durham, which 700 years ago was home to a group of power-crazed bishops who behaved more like warriors than religious leaders. The experts head to Dirleton Castle in East Lothian to reveal the role one of the men played in defending England from William Wallace's army, and also try their hands at the art of stained glass-making, and fire a working trebuchet - the ultimate medieval weapon of war(n)

programme.title: Tony Robinson's History of Britain
programme.desc: The actor explores the lives of people from the Georgian era, including the stories of gin entrepreneur Elizabeth Bowman, who fell foul of the law when her enterprise was made illegal, and coach driver Jack Rann, who became a highwayman(n)

programme.title: How the Victorians Built Britain
programme.desc: Michael Buerk looks at the building of bridges around the nation during the era, visiting Clifton Suspension Bridge in Bristol to reveal the secret construction masterpiece that lay hidden in the structure's core for more than a century. He also discovers how the Tay Bridge disaster led to huge leaps in technology and how a new metal emerged as the bridgemaker's building block of choice(n)

programme.title: Henry VIII and His Six Wives
programme.desc: Suzannah Lipscomb and Dan Jones examine the relationships between the king and his first two wives, who were Catherine of Aragon and Anne Boleyn(n)

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Chocolate
programme.desc: At Prestat, owner Nick is proud of his Royal Warrant, but also of the company's place in history as inventors of the chocolate truffle in 1895. Cameras focus on the expertise which makes these chocs fit for a Queen. There's also a profile of Mackintosh's, creators of Quality Street, Rolo and more. Plus, a nostalgic look at the most romantic ad ever, as voted for by the public(n)

programme.title: Lip Sync Battle UK
programme.desc: Melanie Brown and Professor Green present as comedian and actor Chris Ramsey faces off against former JLS singer Aston Merrygold, lip-synching to hit songs. Their first choice of song is performed in 'civvies', as Mel and the Pro keep it from getting too crazy, but for their second choice Chris and Aston must bring it all to the floor in the form of wigs, costumes and backing dancers. The audience decides who performed better, and more than pride is at stake - there is also the chance to walk away with the coveted Lip Sync Battle UK championship belt(n)

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling(n)

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: Six young privileged Brits, who believe that homelessness is often the result of the victim's own actions, agree to live on the streets of London for three nights. They include 23-year-old Kieren, who plans to beg to raise money that he will invest in umbrellas. On his first night he only makes £5, and finds a place under the arches near Trafalgar Square to bed down. Woken up by security, Kieren begs for several more hours until he makes enough to stay in a hostel(n)

programme.title: In Therapy
programme.desc: The TV personality and Atomic Kitten singer undergoes psychological evaluations with leading UK therapist Mandy Saligari. Exploring the impact of Kerry's troubled childhood and turbulent previous relationships, the therapy session allows Kerry to offer an insight into some of her troublesome past demons, and give her own version of events documented so openly in the media(n)

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice helps a Worcestershire couple sell their country cottage, which has been on the market for more than a year. She thinks their pet parrots might be discouraging prospective buyers - but needless to say, they are reluctant to get rid of them(n)

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Historian Tim Marlow explores the life and work of 17th-century visionary Dutch artist Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn, who was famed for his skilful handling of light and shade in paintings portraying the human form. Born in Leiden in 1606, the eighth of nine children, his passion for art led him to an apprenticeship with a local painter, and from the time he was a 19-year-old he had a studio in Amsterdam, where he produced 75 self-portraits. Demand for his talents soon grew and success came when he was commissioned to paint The Anatomy Lesson of Dr Tulp(n)

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary(n)

programme.desc: The playgroup is on a bus ready to go on a trip to the museum, but its members realise Pedro is nowhere to be found(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve (2004)
programme.desc: The crooks reunite when an old enemy catches up with them and demands they repay the money they stole from him three years previously. In response, the gang comes up with another larcenous plan - but reckons without the interventions of a fellow thief and a sultry Interpol agent. Crime caper sequel, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia and Don Cheadle(n)

programme.desc: Round-up of the latest headlines, sports news and weather(n)

programme.title: Inside Iceland: Britain's Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: On the search for a high-end restaurant-style chip to add to their existing range, Iceland's chip buyer heads to Belgium to see how to produce a premium chip cheaply. There's also a look at the company's out-of-town bulk-buying spin-off called Food Warehouse, and cameras reveal how the supermarket chain is keen to cash in on the popularity of sea bass(n)

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Chocolate
programme.desc: Examining the story of Fry's, which created the first chocolate bar in 1847, and a look at the sales of dark chocolate which are on the rise. Cameras visit one of the factories that pioneered this sophisticated new wave in the UK, Sussex-based Montezuma. There is also a look at the creation of a near life-size chocolate Elvis(n)

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. However, when the couple start to squabble over their personal habits, she decides to decamp for a while to Thailand and write a travelogue. Unfortunately, she has reckoned without the reappearance of a duplicitous old flame - and a spell behind bars in a Thai prison. Romantic comedy sequel, with Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Hugh Grant, Jim Broadbent and Gemma Jones(n)

programme.title: Night Passage (1957)
programme.desc: The black sheep of a family falls in with a gang of outlaws plotting to rob a train operated by his strait-laced brother, but reckons without his sibling's determination to track him down and set him back on the straight and narrow. Western, starring James Stewart, Audie Murphy, Dan Duryea and Brandon de Wilde(n)

programme.title: Decision at Sundown (1957)
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into a backwoods town intent on finding his dead wife's former lover and exacting revenge for her death. The man he blames now has total control of the town and has the sheriff at his beck and call. Undeterred, the drifter offers his enemy an ultimatum - he has until sundown to leave the town or face retribution for his crimes. Western, with Randolph Scott, John Carroll and Andrew Duggan(n)

programme.title: Strategic Air Command (1955)
programme.desc: A pilot relishes the opportunity to return to the baseball pitch once the Second World War is over. However, his sporting career is put on hold when he's drafted back into the US Air Force and given the opportunity to fly a revolutionary new jet. Drama, starring James Stewart, Frank Lovejoy, Barry Sullivan, Alex Nicol and June Allyson(n)

programme.title: The Day Will Dawn (1942)
programme.desc: A foreign correspondent working in occupied Norway is assigned to an RAF detail helping freedom fighters to sabotage an important German U-boat installation. He enlists the help of a local sea captain's daughter, but the plan goes wrong and he ends up in enemy hands, facing death by firing squad. Second World War adventure, with Hugh Williams, Deborah Kerr and Ralph Richardson(n)

programme.title: Beautiful Creatures (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager falls in love with a new girl in his school, only to discover she is a witch. As dark secrets from her family's past emerge, they discover that on her 16th birthday, she will be required to choose a side in a conflict between good and evil. Fantasy based on Kami Garcia's novel, starring Alden Ehrenreich, Alice Englert, Jeremy Irons and Emma Thompson(n)

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hoards of the alien creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing(n)

programme.title: The Survivalist (2015)
programme.desc: A loner survives the downfall of civilisation, living in a remote cabin on a small plot of land. When two women discover his refuge, he grudgingly allows them food and shelter, but they struggle to trust one another, especially as the supplies begin to run out. Thriller, starring Martin McCann and Mia Goth(n)

programme.title: Danger: Diabolik (1968)
programme.desc: A masked criminal commits a series of daring heists for his girlfriend, but a police inspector and a criminal rival are soon on his trail. Action crime comedy, starring John Phillip Law, Marisa Mell, Michel Piccoli and Adolfo Celi(n)

programme.title: Animal Farm (1954)
programme.desc: Animals rebel against their unscrupulous owner and take control of his farm, vowing to run things fairly, with equality for all. However, the pigs leading the revolt succumb to greed and corruption, culminating in violence and oppression. Animated drama based on George Orwell's novel, narrated by Gordon Heath and with Maurice Denham providing the voices for all the characters(n)

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes (1985)
programme.desc: The teenage detective and his future sidekick Watson meet for the first time at boarding school. The death of Holmes's mentor sets the youngsters on their first case, and they discover that former members of an archaeological survey team have died under suspicious circumstances - pointing to a sinister Egyptian cult using hallucinogenic poisons to kill its victims. Adventure, starring Nicholas Rowe, Alan Cox and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: Cocoon (1985)
programme.desc: The elderly residents of a retirement home treat themselves to an occasional dip in the pool at an abandoned house. It turns out that friendly aliens in human form are using the place to restore dormant members of their species - and energy from their cocoons is giving the old-timers a new lease of life. Ron Howard's sci-fi drama, with Wilford Brimley, Jessica Tandy, Hume Cronyn, Don Ameche and Steve Guttenberg(n)

programme.title: Dr Dolittle (1998)
programme.desc: A doctor is stunned to discover he can talk to animals, and it is not long before his home and surgery are taken over by an assortment of ailing creatures in need of help. However, when the medic's odd behaviour attracts his colleagues' attention, he is forced to rely on his new-found furry friends to save him from the asylum. Comedy, starring Eddie Murphy, Ossie Davis and Oliver Platt(n)

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell(n)

programme.title: The Personal History of David Copperfield Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Armando Iannucci and star Dev Patel talk about bringing Charles Dickens' novel to the screen(n)

programme.title: 47 Metres Down (2017)
programme.desc: Two sisters vacationing in Mexico are trapped in a shark cage at the bottom of the ocean. With less than an hour of oxygen left and great white sharks circling nearby, they must fight to survive. Horror, starring Mandy Moore, Claire Holt and Matthew Modine(n)

programme.title: Nerve (2016)
programme.desc: A teenager finds herself immersed in an online game of truth or dare, where her every move starts to be manipulated by an anonymous community of watchers. Soon, the challenges she and her fellow players are set grow more dangerous, until lives are genuinely at stake. Thriller, starring Emma Roberts and Dave Franco(n)

programme.title: The Last Exorcism Part II (2013)
programme.desc: A woman who survived a demonic possession is left with no memory of her horrific experience. She tries to make a fresh start and piece together the recent events that cost the lives of her family - however, the dark forces soon return to plague her once more. Horror sequel, starring Ashley Bell and Julia Garner(n)

programme.title: My Entire High School Sinking into the Sea (2016)
programme.desc: Dash is in detention when his school is hit by an earthquake, causing the building to slide into the sea and slowly begin to sink. Animated teen comedy, with the voices of Jason Schwartzman, Lena Dunham, Susan Sarandon and Reggie Watts(n)

programme.title: Carry On Jack (1963)
programme.desc: A bumbling midshipman's uniform is stolen by a woman desperate to go to sea, who adopts his identity. Later, the hapless sailor is press-ganged on to the same ship as her. However, while trying to prove who he really is, he has to contend with mutinies, pirates and the Spanish Navy. Comedy, with Bernard Cribbins, Juliet Mills, Kenneth Williams and Charles Hawtrey(n)

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days (2012)
programme.desc: Weedy youngster Greg finds his plans for a lazy school holiday ruined when his mother bans video games and his father organises a series of family activities. When he finds out a girl he likes is working at a country club, he tells his family he has a summer job there as an excuse to spend time with her - but struggles to keep up the deception. Family comedy sequel, starring Zachary Gordon and Steve Zahn(n)

programme.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles (2008)
programme.desc: Life for identical twins Jared and Simon and their sister Mallory begins afresh when their mother inherits a spooky mansion. But after moving in, strange things begin to happen, and as the youngsters investigate, they discover a book that opens up a mysterious world of amazing supernatural creatures. Fantasy adventure, starring Freddie Highmore in a dual role alongside Sarah Bolger and Nick Nolte(n)

programme.title: The Jewel of the Nile (1985)

Her lover joins forces with an old enemy to rescue her, but they get drawn into the hunt for a mysterious ancient treasure that has a connection to an eccentric holy man. Comedy adventure sequel to Romancing the Stone, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito(n)

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen (2003)

Fantasy adventure, based on Alan Moore's comic-book series, starring Sean Connery, Shane West, Stuart Townsend, Richard Roxburgh, Peta Wilson and Tony Curran(n)

He is able to escape with the aid of his daughter, and together they fight to rescue Lenore and wipe out the criminal family. Action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Maggie Grace and Famke Janssen(n)

programme.title: Mercury Rising (1998)
programme.desc: A top-secret government agency has developed a seemingly unbreakable code - only for an autistic boy to crack it in an instant. Assassins succeed in gunning down his parents, but a maverick FBI agent investigating their deaths finds the child hiding in a closet, and resolves to shield him from the hitmen on his trail. Thriller, starring Bruce Willis, Alec Baldwin and Miko Hughes(n)

programme.desc: The young genius moves to Dallas to attend a school for gifted children, the family struggles to cope without him around any more. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage(n)

programme.desc: Amy pulls out all the stops as she hosts a traditional Victorian Christmas Eve dinner for the friends. Meanwhile, Raj's father comes to visit, and the guys do their best to free a bird they accidentally let into the university clean room. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj endures an anxious day as he worries that a space probe he helped design will not function properly, while Leonard and Sheldon agree to go clothes shopping with Penny and Amy. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar, Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica join Adam and his friends Emmy, Dana and Chad on a treasure hunt inspired by the Goonies when Pops misplaces some family jewels and Beverly threatens to reorganise his financial affairs if he fails to find them. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin and Wendi McLendon-Covey(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

The guests are impressed with chef Michael's breakfast, but the hosts are left reeling by the criticisms levelled at their hotel during the feedback session(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Scotia House in Harrogate, where host Marie Lock is hoping her obsessive cleaning regime will give her the edge in the competition. In the rooms, both Michael and Carole and Yvonne and Gail find the deluxe teddy bears freaky, and for Billy and Billy, things are a little on the cosy side. In the afternoon, Marie's keen to show off her moves and pits her guests against each other in a Northern Soul dance off(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Canberra Guest House in Blackpool for the third day of the competition, where host Yvonne Copeland, joined by her part-time helper Gail Wells, hopes her cheap and cheerful B&B will win over her guests. However, Marie finds what she thinks is urine and hair on the toilet seat in her room, and a lack of wi-fi means Billy Junior has to put his business on hold. Yvonne takes her competitors to a local reptile house, but serious divisions unfold within the group, and later, tensions rise again at dinner(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Later, Yvonne makes quite a splash when the hosts organise an assault course for their guests, but slow service during breakfast leaves the B&Bers disappointed - especially when Billy Jr is at a loss to explain what the problem was(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw lead a team of experts who secretly restore classic cars for their unsuspecting owners. They continue by helping James Hutchings-Clarke, whose entire family drive Ford Anglias, but whose own vehicle does not even have an engine(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel are warming up for one of the year's biggest events - Angel's parents' 50th wedding anniversary, which involves inviting more than 100 people to a huge party. There's a bespoke menu to plan and prepare, so Dick has called in the cavalry, with his son James arriving from Cornwall. Together with some help from Arthur, the Strawbridge boys have their work cut out as they create dishes they hope will strike a chord with everyone(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mark, a 35-year-old long-term resident at a neurological hospital, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe, and his devoted parents are with him as doctors attempt to get to the bottom of his symptoms. Three-year-old Thomas is brought in with a high temperature by his parents, who are concerned as he was born with an extremely rare blood condition that meant he needed a full blood exchange when he was less than 24 hours old(n)

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: When the naked body of a man wearing a bull's head is discovered at the Gare de Bordeaux-St-Jean, Captain Anais Chatelet is the first detective on the scene. That evening, an amnesiac is found wandering along the road carrying a car wrench covered in blood. He is taken to a nearby psychiatric institution and placed under the care of psychiatrist Mathias Freire. Before long, Anais's investigations into the murder introduce her to the Greek myth of the Minotaur and she becomes increasingly suspicious of Mathias. With Jean-Hugues Anglade, Raphaelle Agogue, Michael Cohen, Hocine Choutri, Didier Flamand and Mathieu Simonet. In French with English subtitles(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Exploring the hopes and expectations of three different men and how they respond to changes that are beyond their control. They include Stanlie, 24, who is airlifted to St George's by helicopter paramedics after being impaled on a metal rod at a construction site(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Jessica Hynes and guest captain David Walliams take on Jon Richardson and Rhod Gilbert. Sam Simmons joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mark, a 35-year-old long-term resident at a neurological hospital, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe, and his devoted parents are with him as doctors attempt to get to the bottom of his symptoms. Three-year-old Thomas is brought in with a high temperature by his parents, who are concerned as he was born with an extremely rare blood condition that meant he needed a full blood exchange when he was less than 24 hours old(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton travels to the mountains of southern Peru, the home of some of the world's finest coffee, before visiting a coffee maker in Europe to learn about the process that turns coffee beans into instant granules. Meanwhile, Jimmy Doherty tests high-end and cheaper versions of vodka, and Matt Tebbutt investigates Wensleydale cheese(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Amber Moss and Colin Webster from Edinburgh's Portobello district to transform their seaside home into a 1960s-themed haven that reflects their personalities. She introduces her suggestion on cool concrete and gives the couple a lesson in how to create screen-print furniture(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets retired couple Denise Grahame and Roger Denis, who met three years ago, and developed a shared love for Bretagne culture. Moving to Brittany, the pair took up residence in a rented property near the town of Callac, but are now seeking to buy a place of their own. Laura is tasked with seeking out suitable homes within their budget of £120,000, and picks out five rural abodes she believes might fit the bill(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Music therapist Sarah Hadley from Surrey has a long-term love affair with the Greek island of Crete, a place she and her best friend Sue Williams have been visiting together for years. Now, Sarah is after her perfect Cretan holiday home and has asked Sue to help her with the decision. Jasmine Harman shows them five incredible properties for a budget of £150,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Godsisters Roselyn Fleary and Jennifer Lawrence from London have always been best friends and holiday together every year on the Caribbean island of Grenada. As they both have family roots on the island they are now looking for a holiday home that could one day be a full-time retirement location. With a budget of £250,000 Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties, but can she tick all of their boxes?(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two couples whose property searches took some unexpected turns. In 2012, he was in Aberdeen helping Brian and Helen, who were relocating from Essex, with a house hunt featuring some cruel knocks along the way. How are the pair doing seven years on? In 2016, Mike and Sorrel needed Phil's help finding a home in the Tyne Valley. Having lost out on their dream home on the day they were meant to complete their purchase, they were looking to Phil to bring their two-year search to an end(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer guide prospective buyers through the complex world of property viewings and agents. They begin in the popular commuter county of Kent, where homes are snapped up quickly due to their proximity to London. Robin and Gemma have recently returned to the UK after three years in Singapore and want a family home to bring up their baby, while in Tunbridge Wells, Gemma and Barney are looking to buy their first place together in a very competitive market(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Seawood Hotel in Lynton, Devon, where owners Martin and Kyle Fletcher hope to win over their guests with their high standards(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Gooseford Farm B&B in Dartmoor, Devon, where Mary Courtier looks after the B&B and husband Julian takes care of the farm(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants head to Trevarrian Lodge in Newquay, Cornwall, where Jean Hegarty and her husband - professional chef Dec - are hoping the food will win their guests over(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Rivendell Outdoor Club, a clothing-optional resort in Wimborne, Dorset, managed by couple Kerry Murphy and Andy Gautry. On arrival not all the contestants are happy to let it all hang out but a warm welcome from the hosts soon puts them all at ease(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: As the B&B owners meet for the final time, things get heated when Martin and Kyle want to know why Jean and Dec gave their dressing gowns a thumbs down. Mary and Julian are keen to understand why the price wasn't right for Jean and Dec, while Kerry and Andy want to know why they got a low hosting score(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of a week of dinner parties in Belfast sees 30-year-old mobile phone sales manager Steve plan a night filled with banter at the top end of the 'craic spectrum', with him as the 'craic conductor'. His guests are mobile barista Justin, hairbrush executive Julie, straight-talking Cushla and mechanic Marty. The evening features impersonations galore, romance in the air and sausage talk(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Belfast, flame-haired hairbrush executive Julie hopes to charm her way to the £1,000 prize with an evening of fusion food, drawing on her experiences from living in Japan and Hong Kong and serving her own versions of takeaway classics(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Belfast, mobile barista Justin hopes to wow his guests with a barbecue extravaganza; he's even doing his dessert on the barbie. As well as wanting to win over his guests, Justin's keen to win Julie's heart, after flirting with her all week. Table talk is dominated by cheesy chat-up lines, until the atmosphere nose-dives(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Belfast, executive assistant Cushla brings out her serious side as she plans to win over her guests with impressive cuisine. She has scallops and venison on the menu, as well as a very exotic red wine jus, so the pressure is on. Conversation is dominated by Steve's dodgy impressions and Julie and Justin's flirting(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final host in Belfast is garage owner Marty, a fan of Far East cuisine. However, after a week of endless Bo' Selecta! impressions, Steve's starting to get on everyone's nerves. It's the end of the week and there's everything to play for, but will the rising tensions stop Marty scooping the £1,000 prize?(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A visitor to the Appleby horse fair in Cumbria needs intervention after a cardiac arrest, and a 12-year-old girl is treated for multiple injuries after a collision with a vehicle(n)

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: With access to the first nationwide survey and state-of-the-art drones mapping the Great Wall of China, this documentary offers new evidence that reveals its extraordinary magnitude, rewrites its millennia-long history and decodes its complex signals system. Using cutting-edge chemistry, the programme also finds out what has kept the wall standing for so long - a simple cooking ingredient found in kitchens across the world(n)

programme.title: Secrets of China's Forbidden City
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the Beijing palace that housed Chinese emperors for 600 years. The programme reveals the current conservation work being carried out and uncovers new details about past rulers, including trade with Europe and how a marble staircase was transported along an ice road. A scale model is used to demonstrate how the structure was built to withstand earthquakes(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Featuring people who have faced challenges and transformed their lives, including Nicole, who burnt her foot with caustic soda while cleaning her drains. Nicole reveals that she was born a man, and while growing up in Scarborough, she dreamed of becoming a pop star. Cameras also focus on Francis, 28, who has fallen off his bike and is suffering from severe amnesia(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: TV personality Henry Sellers arrives to judge an all-priest version of Stars in Their Eyes, prompting intense rivalry between the star-struck Craggy Island clerics and their Rugged Island counterparts. Comedy, with Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The attractive author of a steamy novel comes to stay on Craggy Island - and it is not long before Ted mistakenly jumps to the conclusion that she has fallen for him. Guest starring Gemma Craven(n)

programme.title: It Was Alright In
programme.desc: Matt Lucas narrates another look back at TV shows from past decades, with clips and reactions to programmes from people not around to watch them at the time. This edition focuses on the time of revolution on the small screen in the 80s, including men co-habiting with sea lions, gay men and women coming out on TV, and monkeys playing tennis on ice(n)

programme.desc: TV personality Henry Sellers arrives to judge an all-priest version of Stars in Their Eyes, prompting intense rivalry between the star-struck Craggy Island clerics and their Rugged Island counterparts. Comedy, with Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Will Hardie and George struggle to bring ancient Roman technology back to life and the build on their log cabin in the wilderness begins in earnest, while the road trip around Italy takes in an impressive fire station. The architect also meets David Moreton, a former Paralympic swimmer hoping to turn an old air ambulance into an amphibious crash pad for his charity fundraising tours, and DIY enthusiasts Ben and Michelle, who want to build a summerhouse for free, using hundreds of disused shipping pallets(n)

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Sue and Simon bought their four-bedroom Hertfordshire home in 2014, but the fake-Victorian extension has given the property a bad layout which is proving something of a nightmare. The couple also believe their home is by far the ugliest on their street. Enter architect Laura Jane Clark, who specialises in breathing new life into unappealing spaces. She has a plan to entirely transform the interior by moving the staircase, putting in skylights and installing an innovative revolving wall. However, Sue and Simon have a tight budget of £50,000 - and that's before they've even started on the exterior(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee wants to create the perfect Christmas for Lucy, so he invites her to spend the holiday in a cosy old country house that used to belong to his dear, dead old aunt - and to make it a proper family get-together, he invites along her parents and dipsy friend Daisy. But the Christmas spirit is in short supply when Lucy discovers that the cottage has not been lived in for years - and it isn't long before they have sensed a spooky presence. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix star in this festive special of the sitcom, with Bobby Ball, Geoffrey Whitehead and Deborah Grant. Festive edition from 2013(n)

programme.title: Wonders of the Monsoon
programme.desc: Documentary examining the plants and animals that thrive in monsoon areas, narrated by Colin Salmon. Crested black macaques take advantage of an abundance of fruit, and maleo birds use the sun to incubate their eggs on the Indonesian island of Sulawesi. On Java, locals climb volcanoes to offer live sacrifices in thanks for the peaks' help in precipitating rain and fertilising plants with ash. The frequent and heavy rains in Borneo have destroyed the soils, created fierce competition for scarce nutrients, and driven evolution to produce some curious creatures. The Rajah Brooke's pitcher encourages tree shrews to relieve themselves to obtain the substances it needs, while the Bornean red leech is capable of swallowing the giant blue earthworm in one gulp(n)

programme.title: Wonders of the Monsoon
programme.desc: Exploring the relationship that has developed over thousands of years between the people who live in monsoon regions and the wildlife they share them with. In the rice paddies of Assam, India, farmers battle a herd of hungry elephants over their crops, while on the Philippine island of Palawan, near Borneo, people still hunt in the forest and live in caves for part of the year. The programme also looks at the impact of organised religion, meeting members of the Bishnoi sect who believe that all life is sacred and have even been known to lay down their lives to protect trees. Colin Salmon narrates(n)

programme.title: Attenborough's Living Lights
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the world of bioluminescence, the often spectacular natural light produced by creatures including glow-worms, fireflies and plankton, using specially designed cameras, some fitted to a new generation of deep-sea submersibles and robots to record instances in the very deep ocean. The programme shows a millipede glowing on the forest floor in California, the mesmerising flashing light patterns of the synchronous firefly, the spooky glow of a rare dragon fish and luminous earth worms in France(n)

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: When elderly teacher Peter Farquhar was found dead at home in the village of Maids Moreton in 2015, it was sad and unexpected, but no one thought it suspicious. But 18 months later, when his neighbour Ann Moore-Martin also fell ill and died, the police decided to look again. They found that Ben Field, a would-be vicar and academic, had recently become part of both the men's lives and benefited from their wills. This programme shows that by delving back in time through friends' and loved ones' memories of Peter and Ben's relationship, as well as Peter's diary, the police discovered a story of love and betrayal(n)

programme.title: NCIS

A blow-up of a different kind is almost immediately on the cards when the two egotists clash over tactics - but both are caught off-guard following the release of a statement to the press taking ownership of the bomb. Crime drama, starring Jonny Lee Miller and Lucy Liu(n)

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Part one of two. A mysterious entity holds the crew of the USS Enterprise-D to account for the crimes of all humanity as Captain Jean-Luc Picard takes them on their first mission - a quest to discover the secret of Farpoint Station. First episode of the sci-fi adventure, starring Patrick Stewart(n)

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Part two of two. The trial continues, with Picard continuing to defend the human race against the mysterious Q's accusations. The captain manages to buy 24 hours by convincing the omnipotent entity the Enterprise's forthcoming mission at Farpoint will be the perfect opportunity to prove mankind's innocence - but failure to do so will mean certain death for himself and the crew. Patrick Stewart stars(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)
